verdicts.reasoning: The description accurately reflects the functionality of Sentry as an error monitoring and observability platform.
The documentation explicitly states that Sentry supports OAuth2 and 'Auth Tokens' as Bearer tokens, confirming the recorded value.
The documentation confirms that users can create auth tokens from the dashboard without requiring sales or admin approval, supporting the recorded value.
The API reference shows a wide set of REST endpoints, confirming the broad coverage of the API surface as stated.
The existence of public REST API docs and the ability for developers to self-issue auth tokens confirms that integrations can be built today without manual approvals.
